author: therden
description: Manage completed instances of recurring tasks that were created and completed using the Tasks plugin.
name: Packrat

releases.author: therden
releases.description:
**Packrat** now properly process indented instances of completed recurring tasks.  
(Thanks to @claremacrae for catching this previously-unreported bug!)
releases.name: Version 1.1.2 released

releases.author: therden
releases.description: This release adds support for the **Dataview** plugin-style inline fields that the **Tasks** plugin for **Obsidian** added last year.
releases.name: Version 1.1.1 released

releases.author: therden
releases.description:
Contains 'under the hood' code improvements identified in Community Plugin pull request process.

Any errors encountered when running **Packrat** command will be both displayed in a Notice and logged to the console.

No other new features.
releases.name: Version 1.1.0 released

releases.author: therden
releases.description:
**Packrat** is a plugin for [Obsidian.md](https://obsidian.md/) that extends the functionality of Martin Shenk's [Obsidian Tasks](https://github.com/schemar/obsidian-tasks) plugin.

**Packrat** automates the process of managing _completed instances of recurring tasks_ that were created and completed using **Tasks**.

**Packrat** will delete, archive, or move those tasks to the bottom of the active not file, based on which user-definable 'triggers' it finds in each task's description.
releases.name: Version 1.0.0 released
